agent_stats.outcome_reasoning: The map shows the Fitzjohns/Netherhall Conservation Area in Camden. A match at Netherhall Gardens yielded a very strong result with 1572 inliers and 85% road name agreement (matching 6 out of 7 roads identified by the reader). Although the scale consistency was marginal (0.52), the extremely high inlier count confirms a correct and precise alignment. The boundary was successfully extracted from page 3.
